Description: Implement a comprehensive authentication system for user registration
Redesign the product catalog with improved filtering
Integrate multiple payment gateways (Stripe
Optimize mobile app performance for iOS and Android platforms.
Implement email and password based user registration and login.
Acceptance Criteria: All user stories in this feature must pass security review; Login must work across all supported browsers

Description: Implement OAuth 2.0 authentication with Google and other providers.
Acceptance Criteria: Social login must integrate seamlessly with existing auth system; User profiles must merge correctly

Description: Implement password reset and account recovery flows.
Acceptance Criteria: Password reset links must expire after 24 hours; Users must receive confirmation emails

Description: Implement hierarchical category navigation for products.
Acceptance Criteria: Category hierarchy must support unlimited nesting; Category changes must not break existing URLs

Description: Implement price range
column28: Filters must work in combination; Filter state must persist across navigation

Description: Implement full-text search with autocomplete and suggestions.
Acceptance Criteria: Search must return relevant results within 500ms; Search suggestions must update in real-time

Description: Display user's past orders with status
column28: Order history must be accessible from user profile; Orders must be filterable by date range

Description: Implement wishlist functionality for saving products for later.
Acceptance Criteria: Wishlist must persist across sessions; Wishlist items must be shareable via email

Description: Implement Stripe payment processing with webhooks for event handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Stripe payments must be PCI compliant; Webhooks must handle all payment events

Description: Implement PayPal payment processing with IPN for notifications.
Acceptance Criteria: PayPal integration must support both redirect and embedded flows; IPN must update transaction status

Description: Allow users to store and manage multiple payment methods.
Acceptance Criteria: Payment methods must be securely stored using tokenization; Users must be able to set a default payment method

Description: Add fraud detection rules and monitoring.
Acceptance Criteria: Fraud detection must flag suspicious transactions; Manual review queue must be implemented

Description: Reduce app startup time from 3.2s to under 1.5s.
Acceptance Criteria: Startup time must be under 1.5s on mid-range devices; Performance must be measured and monitored

Description: Implement offline-first architecture with data caching.
Acceptance Criteria: App must work offline with cached data; Changes must sync automatically when network reconnects

Description: Optimize memory consumption to prevent crashes on low-memory devices.
Acceptance Criteria: Memory usage must stay below 200MB; Memory leaks must be eliminated

Description: Reduce battery consumption during app usage.
Acceptance Criteria: Battery usage must be comparable to similar apps; Background tasks must be optimized

Description: I want to register with email so I can create an account
Type: User can register using email and password with validation.
Related Stories: 1. Registration form with email, password, confirm password; 2. Email validation (format, uniqueness); 3. Password strength requirements (8+ chars, special char); 4. Welcome email sent after registration; 5. Registration must trigger onboarding flow

Description: I want to log in with Google OAuth so I can access quickly
Related Stories: 1. Google Sign-In button on login page; 2. Redirect to Google authentication; 3. Create or link user account on successful auth; 4. Error handling for denied permissions; 5. Social login must work with existing accounts

Description: I want to reset my password so I can regain access
Type: Implement password reset functionality with email verification.
Related Stories: 1. Forgot password link on login page; 2. Email input form with validation; 3. Password reset email with secure link (expires in 24h); 4. New password form with strength validation; 5. Confirmation email after reset; 6. Password reset must invalidate all existing sessions

Description: I want to browse products by category so I can find items easily
Type: Implement category-based product browsing with nested categories.
Related Stories: 1. Category sidebar with expandable hierarchy; 2. Product grid updates when category selected; 3. Breadcrumbs show current category path; 4. URL updates to reflect selected category; 5. Mobile-responsive category navigation; 6. Category selection must persist across sessions

Description: I want to filter products by price range so I can stay within budget
Type: Add price range slider and min/max input fields for filtering.
Related Stories: 1. Price range slider with min/max values; 2. Input fields for exact min/max prices; 3. Real-time product count update as range changes; 4. Filter persists across page navigation; 5. Mobile-friendly price filter interface; 6. Price filter must work with category filter

Description: I want to search for products so I can find specific items
Type: Implement full-text search with autocomplete and suggestions.
Related Stories: 1. Search bar with autocomplete dropdown; 2. Search results page with relevance sorting; 3. Search suggestions based on popular queries; 4. Search within categories option; 5. Handle typos with fuzzy matching; 6. Search must be case-insensitive

Description: I want to view my order history so I can track my purchases
Type: Display user's past orders with status
column29: 1. Order history page accessible from user profile; 2. List of orders with date, status, total; 3. Click to view order details; 4. Filter by date range; 5. Export order history as PDF; 6. Order status must update in real-time

Description: I want to add items to a wishlist so I can save items for later
Type: Implement wishlist functionality for saving products.
Related Stories: 1. Wishlist button on product detail page; 2. Wishlist page showing saved items; 3. Add/remove items from wishlist; 4. Move wishlist items to cart; 5. Share wishlist via email; 6. Wishlist must sync across devices

Description: I want to sort products by price
Epic Name: Add sorting options to product listing pages.
column29: 1. Dropdown with sorting options; 2. URL updates to reflect sort order; 3. Sort persists across navigation; 4. Default sort is Best Match; 5. Sorting must work with filters; 6. Sort order must be remembered per user

Description: I want to integrate with Stripe payment gateway
Type: Implement Stripe payment processing with webhooks for event handling.
Related Stories: 1. Stripe API integration for credit card payments; 2. Payment form with card details input; 3. Webhook handlers for payment events; 4. Transaction logging and error handling; 5. PCI compliance implementation; 6. Stripe must support 3D Secure authentication

Description: I want to integrate with PayPal payment gateway
Type: Implement PayPal payment processing with IPN for notifications.
Related Stories: 1. PayPal API integration; 2. Redirect to PayPal for payment authorization; 3. IPN handler; 4. Transaction status updates; 5. Refund processing capability; 6. PayPal must support recurring payments

Description: I want to save multiple payment methods for future use
Type: Allow users to store and manage multiple payment methods.
